mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password, nickname, rate, role, reg_date) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{rate}, #{role}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, email, password, nickname, rate, role, reg_date AS reg_date FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE nickname = #{nickname }

select us.user_id, us.email, us.nickname, us.rate, train.train_grade, train.depart_station, train.arrive_station, train.dep_date, train.arr_date, train.price, train.promotion, train.reserv_state, train.reg_date, GROUP_CONCAT(seat.seat_info) as seatInfoStr from users us left outer join train_reservations train on us.user_id = train.user_id left outer join train_seats seat on train.train_resv_id = seat.train_resv_id where us.user_id = #{userId} group by train.train_resv_id order by train.reg_date
